title: 9 Herbal Creams For Hyperthyroidism
description: Avena sativa creams contain a key compound called avenacoside, which has been shown to have a balancing effect on the thyroid gland. This is particularly helpful for people with hyperthyroidism, a condition where the thyroid gland produces too much thyroid hormone. The creams also contain other beneficial compounds like beta-sitosterol and avenanthramides, which have anti-inflammatory properties and help reduce stress on the thyroid gland. To use Avena sativa creams for hyperthyroidism...
